reviews.comment:
Cada vez que voy a mar del Plata paso y siempre me hacen lo mismo me dicen que la tarjeta servicio club no pasa y yo la use en todos lados
Voy hacer la queja a servi club cargue 1500$ de nafta y perdí un.monton de puntos. Eso no se hace

(Translated by Google)
Every time I go to Mar del Plata, I stop by and they always do the same thing. They tell me the Service Club card doesn't work, and I used it everywhere.
I'm going to complain to Service Club. I charged $1,500 for gas and lost a ton of points. That's not done.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR3cHNDLUZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los playeros muy buena atención! En el snack bar también! Un desastre los baños de mujeres, muy sucios y nadie limpiándolos! Ni papel higiénico tenían! No vuelvo!👎👎👎

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff were very attentive! The snack bar was great too! The women's restrooms were a disaster, filthy and no one was cleaning them! They didn't even have toilet paper! I won't be back! 👎👎👎
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR3MHIzbkVBEAE
